title: CSIR NAL Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 21 Project Associate, Project Assistant Posts
short_info: National Aerospace Laboratories (CSIR NAL) has published the Project Staff Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 21 Project Staff positions. Candidates within the age range of up to 35 years and holding qualifications such as B.Sc./3-year Diploma in Engineering/Technology, Master's/Integrated Masters, Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology, or SSC/10th plus ITI are eligible to apply via walk-in on 26-05-2026 and 29-05-2026. The notification PDF and application details are available on the official website.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/PwBD/Women: 5 years, OBC: 3 years

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc./3 years Diploma in Engineering/Technology, Masters/Integrated Masters from a recognized University, Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology from a recognized University, SSC/10th plus ITI
qualification.details: Project Assistant-II/ PA-II: B.Sc./3 years Diploma in Engineering/Technology Project Associate-I/ PAT-I: Masters/Integrated Masters from a recognized University OR Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology from a recognized University OR Any equivalent qualifications duly recognized by the concerned authority Project Associate- II / PAT-II: Bachelor’s degree in Engineering or Technology from a recognized University or equivalent and 2 years experience in Research and Development OR Masters/Integrated Masters in Engineering or Technology from a recognized University Project Assistant-I/ PA-I: SSC/10th plus ITI Project Associate- I / PAT-I: Bachelor’s degree in Engineering or Technology from a recognized University OR Any equivalent qualifications duly recognized by the concerned authority Project Associate- II (NET/GATE): Bachelor’s degree in Engineering or Technology from a recognized University or equivalent and 2 years experience in Research and Development OR Masters/Integrated Masters in Engineering or Technology from a recognized University

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies announced by CSIR NAL?
faq.answer: CSIR NAL has announced a total of 21 vacancies for Project Staff positions through this walk-in recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for these CSIR NAL posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for these positions is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person with all required documents.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Staff posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications range from B.Sc./3 years Diploma in Engineering/Technology, Masters/Integrated Masters, Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology, to SSC/10th plus ITI.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the CSIR NAL Project Staff recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts is 35 years, with age relaxations applicable for SC/ST/PwBD/Women and OBC categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Staff positions?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 18,000/- to Rs. 28,000/- per month, plus HRA, depending on the specific post.

faq.question: Q6. Are there any application fees for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there are no application fees mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What are the important dates for the CSIR NAL walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interviews are scheduled for 26 May 2026 and 29 May 2026. The date of publication was 2 May 2026.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at CSIR NAL, Bengaluru, Karnataka, 560017. Specific venue details will be in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Project Staff posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts is based on a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of documents, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable).
